croswell michigan known for.content: Croswellis a city in Sanilac County in the U.S. state ofMichigan.The settlement, originallyknownas Black River, was established in 1845. Later it wasknownas Davisville, after the town's first postmaster. In 1877 it was renamedCroswell, in honor of Governor CharlesCroswell.

croswell known for.content: Croswellis a city in Sanilac County in the U.S. state of Michigan. As of the 2020 census,Croswellhad a population of 2,322.Later it wasknownas Davisville, after the town's first postmaster. In 1877 it was renamedCroswell, in honor of Governor CharlesCroswell.
